title: Close cross-project mutation safety + ergonomics gaps: fix structural target_path routing on holdout task tools, add uniform dryRun preview, and ship non-LLM CLI for ergonomic cross-project ADV tool execution. Establishes the operational completeness of the multirepoproductlinking foundation so ADV agents can safely + fluently work across linked-product repos (e.g. pokeedge-web ↔ pokeedge) without context loss or per-call LLM tax.

tasks.title: T1 — Add shared target_path schema and dryRun-safe mutation override in target-project.ts.
tasks.verification: Verification passed: RED captured missing targetPathSchema and mutation override; GREEN passed `pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/target-project.test.ts` (12 tests) and `pnpm run typecheck`. Checkpoint commit 751d78d3dcb77a9b702f65cf1965749becd2e9f9.
tasks.summary: Added shared `targetPathSchema` in target-project.ts and added dryRun-safe `mutation` override behavior to `withTargetPathStore`, scoped only to trust-gate resolution. Added target-project tests for temporal-required dry-run target reads without mutation confirmation and shared schema parsing.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added shared `targetPathSchema` in target-project.ts and added dryRun-safe `mutation` override behavior to `withTargetPathStore`, scoped only to trust-gate resolution. Added target-project tests for temporal-required dry-run target reads without mutation confirmation and shared schema parsing.

tasks.title: T2 — Add target_path routing parity to adv_task_add.
tasks.verification: Verification passed: RED captured missing target_path routing for adv_task_add; GREEN passed `pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/task.test.ts` (19 tests) and `pnpm run typecheck`. Checkpoint commit f58d355f2ad01c731c52fc68f6efb3317c321940.
tasks.summary: Added shared `targetPathSchema` usage to `adv_task_add` and wrapped the entire add-task flow in `withTargetPathStore` when `target_path` is provided. Target routing now covers planning-gate lock, blockedBy validation, priority calculation, taskAddedSignal, and context snapshot, with `_projectContext` returned for target calls.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added shared `targetPathSchema` usage to `adv_task_add` and wrapped the entire add-task flow in `withTargetPathStore` when `target_path` is provided. Target routing now covers planning-gate lock, blockedBy validation, priority calculation, taskAddedSignal, and context snapshot, with `_projectContext` returned for target calls.

tasks.title: T3 — Add target_path routing parity to adv_task_cancel and adv_task_reclassify_tdd.
tasks.verification: Verification passed: RED captured missing target_path routing for cancel/reclassify; GREEN passed `pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/task.test.ts` (21 tests) and `pnpm run typecheck`. Checkpoint commit ae2ba2c05f62c4220b1a28204d0cb01b09e13e07.
tasks.summary: Added shared `targetPathSchema` usage to `adv_task_cancel` and `adv_task_reclassify_tdd`. Wrapped both flows in target-store closures so validation, task lookup, change resolution, signals, and snapshots use the target store when `target_path` is provided. Added `_projectContext` output for target calls.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added shared `targetPathSchema` usage to `adv_task_cancel` and `adv_task_reclassify_tdd`. Wrapped both flows in target-store closures so validation, task lookup, change resolution, signals, and snapshots use the target store when `target_path` is provided. Added `_projectContext` output for target calls.

tasks.title: T4 — Add same-shape dryRun to change mutation tools.
tasks.verification: Verification passed: RED captured missing dryRun behavior on close/bulk_close/reenter; GREEN passed `pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/change.test.ts` (20 tests) and `pnpm run typecheck`. Checkpoint commit 54df4ffadae5898d10bedf9fddd7221e580b3793.
tasks.summary: Added same-shape `dryRun` support to `adv_change_close`, `adv_change_bulk_close`, and `adv_change_reenter`. DryRun branches now validate inputs/selection/status and return preview responses with `dryRun: true` while skipping Temporal signals and disk cleanup/sweep.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added same-shape `dryRun` support to `adv_change_close`, `adv_change_bulk_close`, and `adv_change_reenter`. DryRun branches now validate inputs/selection/status and return preview responses with `dryRun: true` while skipping Temporal signals and disk cleanup/sweep.

tasks.title: T5 — Add same-shape dryRun to adv_task_cancel, including target_path dryRun behavior.
tasks.verification: Verification passed: RED captured missing adv_task_cancel dryRun and target_path dryRun mutation:false behavior; GREEN passed `pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/task.test.ts` (23 tests) and `pnpm run typecheck`. Checkpoint commit 1210fa5b6e885fda41b4a288a8028129e6ffb38a.
tasks.summary: Added same-shape `dryRun` support to `adv_task_cancel`. DryRun validates approval, reasons, and task IDs, returns `wouldCancel` preview with `dryRun: true`, and skips taskCancelledSignal. Target-path dryRun now routes through target store with `mutation: false` so validation can read target Temporal state without untrusted mutation confirmation.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added same-shape `dryRun` support to `adv_task_cancel`. DryRun validates approval, reasons, and task IDs, returns `wouldCancel` preview with `dryRun: true`, and skips taskCancelledSignal. Target-path dryRun now routes through target store with `mutation: false` so validation can read target Temporal state without untrusted mutation confirmation.

tasks.title: T6 — Add same-shape dryRun to worktree deletion/cleanup tools.
tasks.verification: Verification passed: RED captured missing worktree dryRun pass-through; GREEN passed `pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/adv-worktree.test.ts` (6 tests) and `pnpm run typecheck`. Checkpoint commit 3ca4134eb17c57fcf587a5f9f86ccbda65b76ceb.
tasks.summary: Added `dryRun` args to `adv_worktree_delete` and `adv_worktree_cleanup`, passed dryRun into underlying worktree functions, and added no-delete guards. Delete dryRun returns success preview after integration/uncommitted checks and before hooks/removal. Cleanup dryRun reports retained pending deletions without deleting or clearing registry entries.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added `dryRun` args to `adv_worktree_delete` and `adv_worktree_cleanup`, passed dryRun into underlying worktree functions, and added no-delete guards. Delete dryRun returns success preview after integration/uncommitted checks and before hooks/removal. Cleanup dryRun reports retained pending deletions without deleting or clearing registry entries.

tasks.title: T7 — Add same-shape dryRun to conformance override/unlock actions.
tasks.summary: Added `dryRun?: boolean` support to `adv_conformance` unlock/override. DryRun now validates audit inputs and tracked spec, computes normal same-shape response plus `dryRun: true`, and skips state save, audit append persistence, and conformance signals. Added tests proving unlock dryRun leaves locked state/audit unchanged and override dryRun skips audit write/signal.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added `dryRun?: boolean` support to `adv_conformance` unlock/override. DryRun now validates audit inputs and tracked spec, computes normal same-shape response plus `dryRun: true`, and skips state save, audit append persistence, and conformance signals. Added tests proving unlock dryRun leaves locked state/audit unchanged and override dryRun skips audit write/signal.

tasks.title: T8 — Add spec deltas for cross-project task mutation routing, dryRun mutation behavior, and non-LLM execution investigation outcome.
tasks.summary: Added advance-workflow requirements `rq-crossProjectTaskMutation01`, `rq-dryRunMutation01`, and `rq-nonLlmToolExec01`; bumped spec version to 1.8.1. Added external citations in task/conformance implementation comments and F10 investigation doc so spec-citation invariant passes. Formatted touched files.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added advance-workflow requirements `rq-crossProjectTaskMutation01`, `rq-dryRunMutation01`, and `rq-nonLlmToolExec01`; bumped spec version to 1.8.1. Added external citations in task/conformance implementation comments and F10 investigation doc so spec-citation invariant passes. Formatted touched files.

tasks.title: T9 — Update ADV docs and GitHub issue context for F10/#71 and cross-project tool matrix.
tasks.summary: Updated ADV_INSTRUCTIONS target_path support list to include adv_task_reclassify_tdd, added dryRun/non-LLM execution guidance, compressed Cross-Project Coordination to pass line guard. Updated AGENTS cross-project gotchas with task mutation routing, dryRun, and non-LLM execution notes. Updated docs/f10-investigation.md with 2026-05-11 #71 outcome and supported paths. Added GitHub issue #71 comment and corrected ADV linked issue URL from Opencode-Advance#71 to Advance#71.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated ADV_INSTRUCTIONS target_path support list to include adv_task_reclassify_tdd, added dryRun/non-LLM execution guidance, compressed Cross-Project Coordination to pass line guard. Updated AGENTS cross-project gotchas with task mutation routing, dryRun, and non-LLM execution notes. Updated docs/f10-investigation.md with 2026-05-11 #71 outcome and supported paths. Added GitHub issue #71 comment and corrected ADV linked issue URL from Opencode-Advance#71 to Advance#71.

tasks.title: T10 — Cross-project integration and dogfood verification.
tasks.verification: T10 complete. Checkpoint d90da443190fbce1d9ce1a6809dd4f03b0a7ad45. Live target_path dryRun mutation E2E needs fresh OpenCode session because current host cached pre-build dist; source integration/build passed.
tasks.summary: Ran cross-project/product dogfood reads against `/home/jrede/dev/pokeedge` and `/home/jrede/dev/pokeedge-web` using target_path/product scope; both returned target project context and active changes/tasks. Ran full `pnpm run check`, targeted changed-surface Vitest suite (151 tests), instruction asset suite (70 tests), and `pnpm run build`. Repaired compressed ADV target_path matrix asset test and formatted source files flagged by repo check. Isolated remaining full-suite failure to known unrelated overlay runtime-canary environment test. Built plugin/worker dist successfully; live tool mutation E2E must be re-run in fresh host due OpenCode plugin dist caching.
tasks.implementation_summary: Ran cross-project/product dogfood reads against `/home/jrede/dev/pokeedge` and `/home/jrede/dev/pokeedge-web` using target_path/product scope; both returned target project context and active changes/tasks. Ran full `pnpm run check`, targeted changed-surface Vitest suite (151 tests), instruction asset suite (70 tests), and `pnpm run build`. Repaired compressed ADV target_path matrix asset test and formatted source files flagged by repo check. Isolated remaining full-suite failure to known unrelated overlay runtime-canary environment test. Built plugin/worker dist successfully; live tool mutation E2E must be re-run in fresh host due OpenCode plugin dist caching.

wisdom.content: GitHub issue URLs in ADV change metadata can point at stale/renamed repositories. Before updating issue context, verify with `gh issue view` against the actual `git remote` repo; correct ADV links via `adv_change_update_issues` so archive automation targets the reachable issue.

proposal.approval_evidence: Proposal approved by user reply `continue`. Problem statement and full proposal written; ambiguity scan B/F/S passed with Coverage B:C F:C S:C M:C and no critical findings. Proceeding directly into discovery per post-approval auto-continue.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed. LBP research found #110/#68 validated and #71 must be investigated rather than blindly implemented. User approved acceptance criteria with `approve`; agreement persisted.

design.approval_evidence: Design complete. Validator verdict VALIDATED with implementation cautions; all cautions incorporated into design. No unresolved conflict, no contract-compromise risk, and no user-value tradeoff remains after discovery decisions.

planning.approval_evidence: Prep approved by user reply `approve`. Task graph has 10 tasks with dependencies. TDD intents corrected for docs-only and cross-cutting verification tasks. Strict validation passed with expected NO_DELTAS warning before spec task.

execution.approval_evidence: Execution complete: 10/10 tasks done with checkpoint commits. Verification: `pnpm run check` passed; targeted changed-surface suite passed (151 tests); instruction asset suite passed; `pnpm run build` passed. Full `pnpm test` has one known unrelated overlay runtime-canary environment failure; source integration/build passed. Cross-project read dogfood against pokeedge and pokeedge-web succeeded; live mutation E2E requires fresh OpenCode host due cached dist.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted delivered execution with reply `accept`. Review findings: no blockers; one known unrelated full-suite environment failure in overlay-sync runtime-canary test; live same-session target_path mutation E2E limited by cached pre-build plugin dist, with source tests/build passing and fresh-session E2E noted. Verification passed: pnpm run check, targeted changed-surface suite (151 tests), instruction asset suites (70 tests), pnpm run build, cross-project read dogfood against pokeedge and pokeedge-web.

release.approval_evidence: Archive sign-off received from user reply `sign off`. Release checks passed: adv_change_validate strict passed with expected NO_DELTAS warning; conformance status has no required specs; worktree clean before archive. Remaining caveat documented: fresh OpenCode session needed for live tool E2E because current host cached pre-build plugin dist.

clarify_findings.message: Success criteria are placeholder or empty. What measurable outcomes define done?
Proposal references authentication/authorization without specifying the model. What auth mechanism will be used?
Scope section is empty or placeholder. What specific files/modules will change?
Proposal describes behavior that could fail but doesn't mention error handling or rollback. What happens when things go wrong?
